title: dactylorhiza viridis var. virescens
intro: Dactylorhiza viridis var. virescens, also known as the green hood orchid, is a type of orchid that belongs to the Dactylorhiza genus. It is a perennial plant with green leaves and purple flowers, native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Dactylorhiza viridis var. virescens include its ability to stimulate the cardiovascular system and improve circulation, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease and improving symptoms of respiratory conditions, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions.
